title: cleome bororensis
intro: Cleome bororensis, also known as the Spurred Coral Fountain, is a flowering plant species native to China. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Cleome bororensis has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
